full_prompt: Design the primary pressure hull of an autonomous underwater vehicle benchmark operating in a test pool (38 ft / 11.6 m maximum depth). Vehicle displacement ~45 kg, hull diameter 200 mm OD, cylindrical length 500 mm with two hemispherical endcaps (one O-ring flange access, one integrated). Material: 6061-T6 aluminum (Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, density 2700 kg/m^3), wall thickness nominal 6 mm cylinder + 5 mm endcaps, with anti-corrosion hard-anodized coating. Hull hosts 8 penetrators (4 M16 wet-mate connectors + 2 thruster shafts + 1 acoustic transducer + 1 pressure port). Design depth: 11.6 m freshwater + 2x safety factor = 23.2 m equivalent, giving MEOP 228 kPa external gauge. Load cases: (LC1) MEOP 228 kPa external (-0.228 MPa gauge inside cavity); (LC2) proof pressure 1.5 x MEOP = 342 kPa; (LC3) burst 2.5 x MEOP = 570 kPa must not ultimate-fail; (LC4) thruster reaction: 50 N thrust per thruster at two opposing penetrators produces +/- 100 N couple on hull endcaps; (LC5) handling drop: 1 m drop onto hard surface (10 g impulse); (LC6) O-ring flange preload: 8 x M6 bolts at 10 N-m torque = 18 kN total axial clamp on the flange; (LC7) thermal: fresh-water 15 C to tropical pool 30 C swing. Pass/fail per ANSI/AIAA S-080A + ASME BPVC VIII analog: (R1) max von Mises under LC1-LC2 <= 184 MPa (yield 276 / 1.5); (R2) burst LC3 no ultimate failure (stress <= 310 MPa); (R3) linear-buckling eigenvalue of external-pressure-loaded cylinder under LC1 >= 3.0; (R4) hull + endcap dry mass <= 8 kg; (R5) penetrator boss local stress under LC6 <= 184 MPa; (R6) hull first longitudinal mode above 150 Hz. Deliverables: STEP AP242, pressure FEA per case, buckling eigenvalue, thermal FEA, modal, and mass report.
short_prompt:
Design the primary pressure hull of an autonomous underwater vehicle operating in a test pool (11.6 m max depth). Material class: hard-anodized 6061-T6 aluminum. Design per ANSI/AIAA S-080A + ASME BPVC Section VIII Div 2 analog rules with 1.5 FoS on yield and 2.0 FoS on MEOP for proof, 2.5 for burst.

Envelope: 200 mm OD cylinder, 500 mm cylindrical length + two hemispherical endcaps (one O-ring flange, one integrated); nominal wall 6 mm cylinder, 5 mm endcaps; 8 penetrators (4 M16 wet-mate + 2 thruster shafts + 1 acoustic + 1 pressure port); vehicle displacement ~45 kg, hull target <= 8 kg.

Load cases.
- LC1 MEOP: 228 kPa external (11.6 m x 2 FoS, 23.2 m equivalent).
- LC2 proof: 342 kPa (1.5 x MEOP).
- LC3 burst: 570 kPa (2.5 x MEOP), no ultimate failure.
- LC4 thruster couple: +/- 100 N per opposing-penetrator pair from 50 N thrusters.
- LC5 handling drop: 1 m drop, 10 g impulse.
- LC6 O-ring flange preload: 8 x M6 at 10 N-m = 18 kN total axial clamp.
- LC7 thermal: 15 C to 30 C pool swing.

prompt.title: AUV pressure hull
prompt.brief: 6061-T6 Al pressure hull for 11.6 m test-pool operation, 200 mm OD.
